tip: Rare Candies can level up your pokemon without requiring XP!
Pokemon Gyms are usually based around a certain type or theme!
Ground type moves cannot hit flying type pokemon!
Pokemon can have multiple different types, this can give your team more coverage!
Certain types of moves do less damage to other types!
Certain types of moves do more damage to other types!
A fire type move that hits a grass and bug type pokemon does 4x damage!
Some pokemon moves can cause statis effects!
Not all moves have a 100% hit chance!
If you can't go to the pokemon station when your pokemon is low, use a potion!
